reviews.comment:
Soy socio vitalicio. He disfrutado el ACA en sus numerosos servicios: auxilio mecánico, gomeria.  combustible.hoteleria, viajes y siempre encontré un trato amable servicial y con promociones para socios. Esta estación no fue la excepción.

(Translated by Google)
I'm a lifetime member. I've enjoyed the ACA's many services: roadside assistance, tire repair, fuel, hotels, travel, and I've always found them friendly, helpful, and offered member promotions. This station was no exception.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VNcU9rckNvbjhLQ05nEAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Excelente el estado del baño! Súper limpio y con buena calidad de papel higiénico
Buenísimas las opciones de comida casera a buen precio y atención

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom was excellent! Super clean and with good quality toilet paper. The homemade food options were great, at a good price, and the service was fantastic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VPdTExOWEyb3RPSnRRRRAB
